units.source_text: 1 包括出售阿根廷業務產⽣的10億美元虧損以及撥回貨幣換算儲備虧損及其他儲備虧損52億美元，但部分被出售加拿⼤銀⾏業務產⽣的48億美元增益（包括出售所得
units.translation_target_text: 1 Including a $1.0 billion loss from the sale of the Argentina business and a reversal of currency translation reserve losses and other reserve losses of $5.2 billion, but a gain of $4.8 billion from the partial sale of the Canadian banking business (including proceeds from the sale)

units.translation_target_text: This was offset by foreign exchange hedging gains of US$300 million, as well as the reversal of currency translation reserve losses of US$600 million and other reserve losses of US$400 million.
